translation.Sobre parte 1: Front-end developer with extensive experience in modern web development technologies such as JavaScript, TypeScript, React, Svelte, Vue, and Lit. I have a strong passion for UI/UX, ensuring that every interface I develop not only meets technical standards but also provides a seamless user experience. My career has been focused on creating efficient and scalable interfaces, with an emphasis on standardization and maintenance of design systems. Additionally, I have experience in complex environments such as SAPUI5 and WordPress, delivering robust and integrated projects.
translation.projeto_incrivel:
Do you have an Amazing Project
in mind? Let's talk

topics: Developing a robust design system using LitElement, with a strong emphasis on accessibility and user experience, ensuring compliance with WCAG standards.
Maintaining and enhancing the company’s component library, delivering reusable and efficient solutions to streamline developers’ workflows.
Collaborating closely with a technical lead to strategically plan and implement scalable solutions for the design system.
Utilizing tools and frameworks such as Jira, Open WC, and Jest to manage tasks, test components, and ensure high-quality deliverables.
Leveraging Vue.js in additional projects to build efficient, integrated interfaces that align with the company’s goals.
Driving accessibility initiatives, embedding WCAG patterns into the design system to provide inclusive experiences for all users.
Focusing on developer support, creating comprehensive documentation and practical tools to enhance adoption and productivity across teams.

Led the front-end team as a Senior Developer, overseeing the development of interactive interfaces using ReactJS and Svelte, while applying the best design practices to deliver engaging user experiences.
Managed and mentored a team of junior and mid-level developers, providing technical guidance, fostering collaboration, and ensuring the quality and efficiency of all deliverables.
Made strategic decisions regarding system architecture and front-end development, ensuring scalability, maintainability, and alignment with project goals.
Utilized Jest to write and maintain comprehensive unit and integration tests, improving the reliability and stability of the application.
Prioritized accessibility, implementing features and designs that adhered to WCAG standards, ensuring inclusive user experiences for all users.
Developed data visualizations and custom charts, leveraging modern libraries and frameworks to communicate complex data in a clear and intuitive way.
Collaborated closely with cross-functional teams to align front-end deliverables with back-end systems, business requirements, and user expectations.
Collaborated as a UFPE fellow in the Reciprev project in partnership with Recife City Hall, focusing on front-end development and web design.
Solely responsible for the creation, development, and ongoing support of the application, from initial design to final implementation.
Designed and implemented interactive and responsive interfaces, applying best design practices and modern front-end technologies, including HTML, CSS, and JavaScript.
Contributed to the planning and execution of UX strategies, ensuring a high-quality user experience aligned with project goals.
Worked closely with a multidisciplinary team to integrate functional and aesthetic aspects into cohesive, user-friendly solutions.

work_experience.linkedinNote: LinkedIn helped me get this job.
topics: Developed robust enterprise applications using SAPUI5, tailored to meet specific business needs.
Used FIORI to test usability and enhance the user experience in critical interfaces.
Contributed to a project using ReactJS, focusing on bug fixes and implementing functional improvements.
Implemented DevOps practices, including continuous integration and delivery, to ensure quality and efficiency in the development cycle.
Collaborated with cross-functional teams to align technical and functional requirements, delivering high-impact solutions for the client.
Worked with ReactJS in projects following agile methodologies.
Managed tasks and workflows using the Kanban format with tools like Trello.
Designed user interfaces (UI) and user experiences (UX) using Photoshop and Figma.
Collaborated on creating visual and functional solutions aligned with client needs.

work_experience.linkedinNote: LinkedIn helped me get this job.
topics: Enhanced skills in ReactJS and prototype development using Figma.
Applied UI/UX principles to design intuitive and visually appealing interfaces.
Collaborated on the design and development of functional prototypes for idea validation.
Created interactive solutions aligned with end-user needs.

footer.description: Developing interfaces that make life easier for users and maintainers. If you have a cool project, let's talk.
